calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Continued To Nov-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Text Ruling

Motion To (1) Compel Responses To Requests For Production; And (2) For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Counsel, Saunders & Associates, Apc
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Peet's Coffee, Inc.'s 's Motion To (1) Compel Responses To Requests For Production; And (2) For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Counsel is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

Defendant moves under Code of Civil Procedure section 2031.310. This section applies only when further responses are sought. The relevant statute here is section 2031.300

The court finds the motion was timely filed and served.

There is no contention that Defendant's RFPs addressed to Plaintiff Murielle Mutzel are not reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2017.010.) Plaintiff has not established that she provided any responses to the RFPs prior to this motion. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2031.300.) Plaintiff's failure to timely provide responses is not excused.

There is no duty to meet and confer prior to making a motion such as this. In any event, Defendant has demonstrated meet and confer efforts.

Plaintiff Murielle Mutzel shall serve verified, objection-free responses no later than December 30, 2025.

Defendant's request for an order that Plaintiff produce all responsive documents by the same date is denied. Defendant did not cite section 2031.320, let alone demonstrate a basis for relief under it. In any event, currently the court sees no substantial basis for relief under section 2031,320.

The court does not find Plaintiff Murielle Mutzel and her counsel acted with substantial justification in connection with this discovery. Plaintiff Murielle Mutzel and her counsel Gary S. Saunders and Saunders & Associates, APC, jointly and severally, shall pay to Defendant, through counsel, $960 as sanctions, payment no later than January 6, 2026. (See Code of Civil Procedure sections 2023.010, 2023.030, 2031.300(c).)

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PEET'S COFFEE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The Evans declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred "in person, by telephone, or by video conference" in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. The response to the complaint is now due by December 16, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
